# 函数: GlobalPropsConsumer()

```ts
function GlobalPropsConsumer(props: ConsumerProps<GlobalProps>): null | ReactElement<any, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>
```

The [Consumer](https://react.dev/reference/react/createContext#consumer) Component that provide `lynx.__globalProps`.
This should be used with [GlobalPropsProvider](/api/react/Function.GlobalPropsProvider.mdx)
